zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wynslowe於1415年出生在英國武斯特斯爾艾爾德斯費爾德時，他的父親William Wynslowe40歲，母親Agnes Poure36歲。他於1438年與Agnes Throckmorton在英國奧可福爾布爾頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1463年3月31日在英國奧可福爾布爾頓享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wynslowe于1415年出生在英国武斯特斯爾艾爾德斯費爾德时，他的父亲William Wynslowe40岁，母亲Agnes Poure36岁。他于1438年与Agnes Throckmorton在英国奧可福爾布爾頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1463年3月31日在英国奧可福爾布爾頓享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wynslowe was born in 1415, in Eldersfield, Worcestershire, England, his father, William Wynslowe, was 40 and his mother, Agnes Poure, was 36. He married Agnes Throckmorton in 1438, in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 31 March 1463, in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wynslowe est né en 1415, à Eldersfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Wynslowe, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes Poure, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Throckmorton en 1438, à Bourton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 31 mars 1463, à Bourton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Wynslowe 1415 in Eldersfield, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wynslowe 40 und seine Mutter Agnes Poure 36. Er hat 1438 in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England Agnes Throckmorton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 31. März 1463 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wynslowe è nato il nel 1415 nel Eldersfield, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, William Wynslowe, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Poure, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Throckmorton nel 1438, nel Bourton, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 31 marzo 1463, nel Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wynsloweが1415年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルダースフィールドで生まれた時，父William Wynsloweは40歳，母Agnes Poureは36歳であった。1438年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアボウルトンでAgnes Throckmortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1463年3月31日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアボウルトンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wynslowe(이)가 1415년 영국 워스스터실르 엘더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wynslowe(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Poure(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1438년 영국 스퍼드실르 부르턴에서 Agnes Throckmorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 3월 31일 영국 스퍼드실르 부르턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wynslowe nasceu em 1415, em Eldersfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Wynslowe, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Poure, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Throckmorton em 1438, em Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de março de 1463, em Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wynslowe родился в 1415 г. в местности элдирсфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wynslowe было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Poure, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Throckmorton в 1438 г. в местности буртон, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 31 марта 1463 г. в местности буртон, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Wynslowe nació en 1415, en Eldersfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Wynslowe, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes Poure, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Agnes Throckmorton en 1438, en Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1463, en Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
